title: 空间感 / Elevation
goal: 页面底变暖渐变，卡片去边框换 ring+真阴影，圆角统一到 16/20/pill

changes.action: .card 去 border 改 ring-1 ring-stone-900/5 + shadow-e1，圆角 16px；.tab-bar 去 border-top 改 shadow-e2 + ring；body 背景交给 Layout 渐变
根容器 bg-warm-50 → bg-page-warm；header bg-warm-50/80 → bg-surface-0/80
card rounded-2xl → rounded-card shadow-e1 ring-1 ring-stone-900/5，hover shadow-e2 -translate-y-0.5
border border-gray-100 → ring-1 ring-stone-900/5 shadow-e1，rounded-xl → rounded-card
底部加 1px bg-gradient 顶边替代纯灰边
卡片上 rounded-xl/2xl/3xl 收敛到 rounded-card/rounded-container

acceptance: 页面底为暖渐变而非纯色
constraints: tailwind.config.js 只增 key 不删
backdrop-blur 只保留 sticky header 和 modal overlay 两处，不扩散
